name: Purifloh Limited
description: PuriflOH Limited is an Australian-founded company that specializes in the commercialization of globally patented Free Radical Generator (FRG) technology. This innovative plasma-based system is designed to destroy biological and chemical contaminants, including PFAS, in air, water, and on surfaces. By harnessing UV light, free radicals, and electrons in a single, energy-efficient process, the company provides sustainable, chemical-free purification solutions for residential, commercial, and industrial applications. PuriflOH is committed to delivering high-performance, scalable technology that minimizes environmental impact while ensuring safer environments through advanced, nanoparticle-level decontamination.
